powers.name: Nobel's Charm
powers.description: Gain advantage on a Charisma Check.

powers.name: Glory Kill
powers.description: Gain 5 Temporary HP when killing a creature.

powers.name: Unwavering Resolve
powers.description: Gain advantage on your next saving throw.

powers.name: Spark Of Life
powers.description: Grant an ally within line of sight Advantage on their next death saving throw.

powers.name: Human Shield
powers.description: take a hit intended for an ally within 5 feet. If your AC exceeds the attack roll, you negates all damage and on-hit effects. Otherwise, you becomes the target and takes the attack normally..

powers.name: Mighty
powers.description: Gain Advantage on a Grappling check or an Athletics check

powers.name: Polyglot
powers.description: Cast the spell Comprehend Languages without costs

powers.name: Restore Form
powers.description: Heal an ally for 5 HP or repair a Small or Medium object.

powers.name: Doomed Fate
powers.description: Impose Disadvantage on an enemy's next saving throw.

powers.name: Bright Sun
powers.description: Illuminate a 10-foot radius, reveal hidden traps and hidden creatures, remove invisibility benefits, and outline traps in golden light. This effect lasts for 1 minute

powers.name: Intimidating Aura
powers.description: Project a 15-foot intimidating aura. Creatures in the aura make a Wisdom save or become frightened; creatures that succeed are immune for 24 hours.

powers.name: Metallic Skin
powers.description: Gain +1 AC until the start of your next turn.

powers.name: Ritual Adapt
powers.description: Cast a known or prepared level 1 ritual spell as a ritual.

powers.name: Bloody Strike
powers.description: On hitting an enemy, use to apply Bleeding. Bleeding deals 1d4 damage at the start of each of the target’s turns. It does not stack; reapplying refreshes it.

powers.name: Reusable Trap
powers.description: Neutralizing a trap allows it to be taken and reused later

powers.name: Dark Strike
powers.description: On your next successful hit, the target makes a Constitution save or is blinded until the end of its next turn.
